rows.label: qev013304_MSG0002
rows.name:
...This is Larry, how is
the transmission quality?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0003
rows.name:
According to Peter, you went to
save Bates, but how is it? Is
the little chick still alive?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Eh... he was already dead when you
arrived!? Hey, where are you right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0005
rows.name:
...West of the Emerian Battlegrounds in
the Black Steel Continent? Hey, isn't
that... a highly contaminated area...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0006
rows.name:
Why did Bates escape to a place like
that...? He must have been done in
by the toxins filling that area...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_JNK0010
rows.name: Refrain

rows.label: qev013304_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Larry you have no idea.

rows.label: qev013304_JNK0020
rows.name: Confess

rows.label: qev013304_SEL0021
rows.name: Admit that you sent Bates that way.

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Did you tell Bates to...
No... it's nothing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0009
rows.name: I... see... you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0011
rows.name:
...No, this is no time to be
crying. Right now is the time
to act for the living...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Listen, I just received a message from
Corondas's squad saying they're at Banshee
Cave in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0014
rows.name:
It seems they were attacked by the enemy
immediately after the radio connected,
and the transmission cut off, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0015
rows.name:
Please, bring the Captain back to
NLA alive and save Corondas's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0016
rows.name:
Even in this state... if the
Captain returns, I'm sure he'll
somehow manage to fix things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev013304_SEL0031
rows.name: Agree to help no matter what.

rows.label: qev013304_JNK0040
rows.name: Resist

rows.label: qev013304_SEL0041
rows.name: Say that you're not confident you can pull it off.

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0017
rows.name:
...You really are reliable, as
expected. Just like Captain Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. Please be
extremely careful of the black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0019
rows.name:
...It certainly isn't a simple
operation. I understand your unease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013304_MSG0020
rows.name:
Even so, you're the only one we
have. ...I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
